channel.title: Pix on DePix Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Pix on DePix Blog

item.title: DePix vs Traditional PIX: Why Use Crypto
item.description:
Brazil’s PIX system is one of the most successful instant payment platforms in the world. It is fast, free for individuals, and used by over 150 million people. So why would anyone need an alternative? The answer lies in what PIX does not offer: financial privacy, self-custody, and access to the broader crypto ecosystem. DePix fills that gap. This article provides an honest, practical comparison of both options.

What PIX does right

Before any comparison, PIX deserves credit for what it has accomplished. Launched by Brazil’s central bank in November 2020, it has fundamentally transformed payments in the country.

item.title: How to Receive PIX Payments in Bitcoin
item.description:
If you earn Bitcoin from freelance work, investments, or any other source and need to convert it to Brazilian reais, you know the process can be frustrating. Traditional exchanges involve account verification, trading fees, withdrawal delays, and a lot of waiting. The DePix App offers a faster, simpler path from Bitcoin to reais in your bank account via PIX.

The problem with traditional Bitcoin-to-fiat conversion

Converting Bitcoin to local currency through a conventional exchange typically involves several steps. You create and verify an account (which can take days), deposit your Bitcoin and wait for confirmations, place a sell order on the exchange, wait for the trade to execute, request a withdrawal to your bank account, and then wait one to three business days for settlement.

item.title: How to Withdraw DePix to Your Bank Account
item.description:
You have DePix on the Liquid Network and want to convert them to reais in your bank account. The process is straightforward and fast. This guide walks you through every step of withdrawing DePix and receiving the funds via PIX, Brazil’s instant payment system.

Why withdraw DePix to reais?

Holding DePix on the Liquid Network offers genuine advantages: financial privacy, self-custody, and access to the Bitcoin ecosystem. But there are times when you need reais in your bank account — to pay bills, make purchases at shops that only accept traditional payment methods, or simply to have cash available.

item.title: What Is DePix? Brazil's Stablecoin on Liquid
item.description:
If you have been following cryptocurrency but wondered how digital money actually works in everyday life, DePix is a great place to start. This article explains what DePix is, how it connects Brazil’s instant payment system (PIX) to the Bitcoin ecosystem, and why it matters for anyone interested in stablecoins and the Liquid Network.

What is a stablecoin and why does it matter?

A stablecoin is a cryptocurrency pegged to a traditional currency. Unlike Bitcoin, which can swing 10% in a single day, a stablecoin maintains a stable value. DePix is pegged 1:1 to the Brazilian real (BRL), meaning each DePix token is always worth exactly one real.
